keys.restored: Backup furtuu deebifameera ✓ Furtuun gara meeshaa kanaatti galfameera
keys.noBackup: Akaawuntii kanaaf backup icciitii hin jiru

keySetup.title: Furtuu meeshaa kee qopheessi
keySetup.description: Meeshaan kun ammaaf furtuu dhuunfaa kee hin qabu. Backup passwordiin eegame galchi ykn keypair haaraa uumi.
keySetup.imported: Furtuun dhuunfaa gara meeshaa kanaatti galfameera. Amma ergaawwan durii dubbisuu dandeessa.
keySetup.enterPassword: Furtuuwwan kee nageenyaan backup gochuuf password akaawuntii kee galchi.

encryptionRecovery.title: Encryption Bulchi
encryptionRecovery.description: Backup godhi, deebisi, bani ykn encryption key reset godhi.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Browser kun amma ergaawwan encrypted decrypt gochuu hin danda'u. Itti fufuuf furtuu kee deebisi, bani ykn reset godhi.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key restore guutuu miti ykn sirrii miti
errors.noServerPublicKey: Akaawuntiin kun server public key amma hin agarsiisu
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup encryption key akaawuntii ammaa waliin wal hin simu

confirm.reset:
Akaawuntii kanaaf encryption reset gochuu barbaaddaa?

Ergaawwan encrypted durii furtuu jalqabaa yoo hin deebifne dubbifamuu dhiisuu danda'u.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Kun encryption key haaraa akaawuntii keetiif uuma. Ergaawwan encrypted durii furtuu jalqabaa yoo hin deebifne dubbifamuu dhiisuu danda'u.

auth.headline: Ergaa nageenya qabu namni hundi bakka kamiyyuu irraa
auth.description: End-to-end encryption, hiikkaa afaanota 100 ol keessatti, ergaawwan ofumaan badanii fi bilbila sagalee/viidiyoo.

feature.translation: Hiikkaa ergaa smart app keessatti ijaarame
feature.privacy: Dhuunfaa dursa. Daataan kee, too'annoon kee.
feature.translate: Hiikkaa ergaa smart app keessatti ijaarame

hero.line1: Ergaa nageenya qabu namni hundi bakka kamiyyuu irraa — waliin
hero.sub: Wi‑Fi ykn data irratti addunyaa guutuu keessatti bilbiluu fi ergaa erguuf lakkoofsa nageenya qabu bilisaa argadhu. End-to-end encryption, ergaawwan badan, fi HD voice/video calling fayyadami.
hero.freeNote: Bilbilli fi ergaan bu'uuraa bilisa. AI fi faayidaawwan premium upgrade barbaadu.

feat.encryption: Encryption dhuma irraa gara dhumaatti, yeroo hunda hojii irra
feat.privacy: Dhuunfaa dursee. Odeeffannoo kee, to'annoo kee.

auth.scanHelper: Desktop irra jirtaa? App argachuuf bilbila keetiin scan godhi.
auth.desktopTip: Desktop irratti jirtaa? App argachuuf bilbila keetiin scan godhi.
auth.subhead: Ergaawwan dhuunfaa, encrypted fi hiikaman — battalumatti.
auth.tip: Tika: Web fi mobile irratti akaawuntii tokko fayyadami. Ergaawwan kee wal simatu.

registration.passwordDescription: Yoo xiqqaate arfii 6. Password cimaa fi addaa fayyadami.
registration.smsConsent: Akaawuntii uumuun, sochii Chatforia kee waliin walqabatan irratti SMS notifications argachuuf walii galta. Message & data rates jiraachuu danda'u. Settings keessatti yeroo kamiyyuu opt out gochuu dandeessa.

auth.enterValidRecipient: Maqaa contact olkaa'ame ykn lakkoofsa bilbilaa sirrii galchi.
auth.sendFailed: Ergaan ergamuu hin dandeenye. Bal'inaaf console ilaali.

home.title: Mana
home.messagesSubtitle: Marii jalqabuuf nama fudhataa olitti galchi, sana booda ergaa ergi.
home.mixedRecipients: Namoonni fudhatan walmakaa dha. Lakkoofsota bilbilaa (SMS) qofa ykn usernames Chatforia qofa fayyadami.
home.needNumber: SMS erguuf dura lakkoofsa Chatforia qabaachuu qabda.

chat.selectPrompt: Marii jalqabuuf ergaa ykn kutaa marii filadhu
chat.blockConfirm: {{name}} dhorkuu barbaaddaa? Ergaawwan isaanii hin argattu.
chat.blockError: Fayyadamaa dhorkamu adda baasuun hin danda'amne.
chat.unlockToView: Ergaa kana ilaaluuf furtuu kee bana

messageInput.freeLimit: Daangaan free: auto-delete hanga guyyaa 1. Gara 1dtti murameera.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Auto-delete Premium keessatti guyyaa 30 qofa. Gara 30dtti murameera.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Encryption hin milkoofne. Ergaan hin ergamne.
messageInput.caption: Ibsa (dirqama miti)

errors.rateLimit: Ergaa baay'ee saffisaan ergaa jirta. Suuta godhi.
errors.validation: Dogoggora sirreeffamaa. Ergaa kee ilaaliitii irra deebi'i.
errors.failedToSend: Erguun hin milkoofne. Deebitee yaaluu dandeessa.

status.filesNote: Faayilii 5 ol hin ta'u. Defaultiin 24h keessatti ni bada.

contactList.couldNotStart: Marii jalqabuu hin danda'amne. Mee irra deebi'i.
contactList.startFailed: Mariin jalqabamuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'i.
contactList.callStarted: Lakkoofsa kana gara lakkoofsa Chatforia keetiin bilbilaa jira…

addContactModal.title: Contact dabali
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: Ofii kee akka contactitti dabaluun hin danda'amu.

startChatModal.title: Marii jalqabi
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Maqaa, username ykn lakkoofsa bilbilaa barbaadi
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Contacts barbaacha kee waliin wal hin simne.
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Maqaa, username, bilbila ykn imeelii barreessi…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Username ykn bilbila barreessiitii Search tuqi.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Bilbila/imeelii entries akka contactsitti yoo olkaa'amani booda argamu.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Namoota filataman waliin marii jalqabuu hin danda'amne.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Contacts olkaa'aman alias, maqaa, username ykn bilbilaan barbaadi
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Battalumatti mari'achuuf liinkii afeerrii kee qoodi.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Chatforia iOS fi Android waliin yeroo hunda wal qunnamaa jiraadhu.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tika: Ergaawwan kee web fi mobile gidduutti wal simatu.

profile.title: Piroofaayilii Fayyadamaa
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Ergaa original fi hiikame waliin agarsiisi
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Bilbiloota fi ergaawwan dhufan gara bilbila ykn imeelii mirkanaa'eetti dabarsi. Bilbiloonni/ergaawwan bahan lakkoofsa Chatforia kee agarsiisuu danda'u.
profile.errSmsDest: Yoo xiqqaate bakka itti ergamu tokko filadhu (bilbila ykn imeelii).
profile.errQuietHours: Sa'aatiin callisu 0 fi 23 gidduu ta'uu qaba.

sounds.customComingSoon: Sagalee ofii olkaa'uun yeroo dhihoo keessatti dhufa.
sounds.freeNotice: Ati Free irratti jirta — sagaleewwan Premium ni mul'atu garuu cufamanii jiru. Hunda banuuf olka'i.

aiSettings.title: Qindaa'ina AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Hiikkaa, smart replies fi deebiiwwan ofumaan ForiaBot bulchi.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Deebii saffisaa yaaduuf ergaawwan muraasa AItti ergi.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Yoo baname AI jechoota sirrii hin taane ni haguuga.
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Yeroo hojii irra jirutti auto-reply hojii irra oolchi

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Filannoowwan Chatforia sagalee malee salphatti fayyadamuuf.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Hammamtaa idileerraa eegala. Yoo barbaadde guddisi.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Banners fi title blink agarsiisuun sochii akka hin dhabne taasisa.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Beeksisawwan waliin vibration meeshaa hojii irra oolcha.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Bilbilli yeroo dhufu ifa gabaabaa agarsiisa.
accessibilitySettings.enableLiveCaptions: Bilbiloota keessatti live captions hojii irra oolchi (Premium)
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Sagalee nama biraa irraa captions yeroo dhugaa agarsiisi.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotes: Voice notes ofumaan gara barruutti jijjiiri
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Ergaawwan sagalee argatte irratti transcript dabala.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Server irratti ciphertext qofa olkaa'i. AI/Translate fi moderation previews ni dhaabbata.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE hojii irra ooleera. AI/Translate ni dhaabbata.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Meeshaalee Walqabatan
linkedDevicesPanel.addedLastSeen: {{created}} irratti dabale • yeroo dhumaa {{lastSeen}} irratti mul'ate

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Pilaana mobile Chatforia kee, lakkoofsota fi forwarding bulchi.

options.heading: Akkaataa Chatforia fayyadamuu barbaaddu filadhu
options.subheading: Lakkoofsa Chatforia haaraa argachuu ykn lakkoofsa kee ammaa gara Chatforia Wireless geessuu dandeessa.
options.portNumber: Lakkoofsa kee ammaa gara Chatforia Wireless geessi

port.heading: Lakkoofsa kee ammaa geessi
port.subheading: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa kee gara Chatforia geessi.
port.success: Port request ergameera! Odeeffannoo ni siif kennina.

status.heading: Haala porting
status.subheading: Haala request lakkoofsa geessuu kee hordofi.

wireless.exhausted: Daataan kee dhumeera. Fayyadama itti fufuuf pack haaraa bitadhu.

phoneNumberManager.freeNumberHint: Lakkoofsa bilisaa yeroo hojii dhabee deebi'ee kennamuu danda'u.
phoneNumberManager.premiumNumberHint: Subscription Premium yeroo qabdu lakkoofsa kee ni eegata.
phoneNumberManager.invalidAreaCode: Mee area code digit 3 sirrii galchi.

dialer.title: Bilbiloota
dialer.subtitle: Kiipad fi bilbiloota dhihoo.
dialer.resolveFailed: Nama bilbilamu adda baasuun hin danda'amne.

callHistory.title: Bilbiloota
callHistory.subtitle: Bilbiloota kee galanii fi bahan dhihoo.
callHistory.emptySubtitle: Bilbiloonni kee dhihoo asitti ni mul'atu.

video.title: Viidiyoo
video.roomsDesc: Viidiyoo namoota hedduu maqaa kutaa tokko fayyadamuun.
video.roomsIntro: Kutaa namoota hedduu keessatti gali ykn uumi.

phoneWarning.title: Lakkoofsi kee yeroo muraasa keessatti xumurama
phoneWarning.body: Lakkoofsi kee {{number}} guyyaa {{date}} irratti ni gadhiifama yoo haaromsuu baatte.

premium.heading: Premium ta'i
premium.description: Faayidaa cimaa banuu fi beeksisa keessaa haquu.

upgrade.title: Olka'i
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Free plan beeksisa qabu irraa jalqabi. Plus waliin beeksisa keessaa ba'i ykn Premium waliin faayidaa hunda bani.
upgrade.subtitle: Pilaana app filadhu, data packs ofii keetiif dabali, ykn maatii kee waliin data qoodi.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Faayidaa cimaa banuu fi beeksisa keessaa haquu.

free.title: Free
free.desc: Bilisaan mari'adhu. Chatforia yaaluuf gaarii dha.

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Waggaatti)
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Dursee kaffalama. Yeroo kamiyyuu dhiisuu dandeessa. Kaffaltii dhokataa hin jiru.

free.a: Eeyyee. Free plan lakkoofsa Chatforia, bilbila fi ergaa beeksisa waliin of keessaa qaba. Yeroo barbaadde olka'uu dandeessa.

cancel.q: Pilaana yeroo kamiyyuu jijjiiruu ykn haquu nan danda'aa?
cancel.a: Eeyyee. Subscription kee billing page keessatti bulchuu ykn haquu dandeessa.

error.invite: Afeerraan uumamuu hin dandeenye. Abbaa maatii ta'uu kee mirkaneeffadhuutii irra deebi'i.
error.checkout: Checkout Family plan jalqabuu hin dandeenye. Mee irra deebi'i.

billing.freePlanCopy: Ati free plan irra jirta. Faayidaa dabalataa argachuuf olka'i.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Subscription kee billing portal keessatti bulchuu ykn haquu dandeessa.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Pilaana kee battalumatti haqaa? Kun deebi'uu hin danda'u.
billing.cancelNowError: Pilaana haqachuun hin danda'amne. Mee irra deebi'i.

none.title: Maatiin ammaaf hin qophoofne
none.body: Chatforia Family fi shared data pool uumuuf Family plan jalqabi.

data.heading: Shared data pool
data.caption: Miseensonni hundi pool kana waliin fayyadamu. Daangaa dhiyaatte yoo si akeekkachiifna.

invite.title: Miseensa haaraa affeeri
invite.body: Nama tokko shared family data pool keessanitti affeeruuf imeelii ykn liinkii ergi.
invite.expiryHint: Liinkiin kun guyyaa muraasa booda ni xumurama. Haaraa uumuu ni dandeessa.

join.title: Maatii keessaa gali
join.body: Chatforia Family tokko keessatti hirmaachuuf affeeramteetta.
join.success: Maatii kana keessaa galteetta. Amma data isaanii waliin fayyadamta.
join.error: Maatii kana keessatti si dabaluun hin danda'amne. Afeerriin kun sirrii ta'uu dhiisuu ykn yeroo isaa darbuu danda'a.

randomChat.title: Marii Tasaa
randomChat.subtitle: Namoota haaraa battalumatti wal qunnami ykn Ria waliin mari'adhu.
randomChat.description: Dura maqaa hin beekamneen mari'adhaa. Yoo mijate booda Friend dabalaa.
randomChat.setAge: Namoota waliin matched ta'uuf Profile → Age & Random Chat keessatti age range kee filadhu.

ria.intro: Akkam 👋 Ani Ria dha. Yaadni kee maal jedhu?

greetings.long1: Akkam {{name}} 👋 Ani as jira. Yaadni kee maal jedhu?
greetings.long2: Nagaan dhuftan {{name}} 😊 Har'a waa'ee maalii haasa'uu barbaadda?
greetings.long3: Akkam {{name}}! Si dhaggeeffachaa jira — maal ta'e?
greetings.long4: Si arguuf gammadeera {{name}} 👋 Har'a maal yaadaa jirta?
greetings.long5: Akkam {{name}} 🙂 Haasa'uu, gaafachuu ykn qofa mari'achuu barbaaddaa?
greetings.short1: Akkam {{name}}, ani ammaas as jira. Maal ta'e?
greetings.short2: Baga deebite {{name}} 👋 Wanti biraa itti dabaluuf qabdaa?
greetings.short3: Ammas deebiteettaa, {{name}}? 😊 Yaada kee natti himi.

login.title: Gara Chatforia itti fufi
login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on amma hin jiru. Username fi password fayyadami.

verification.sent: Imeeliin mirkaneessaa ergameera. Inbox kee ilaali.
verification.failed: Imeelii mirkaneessaa irra deebi'anii erguun hin milkoofne.

error.unprocessable: Gaaffiin sirrii miti. Username/imeelii fi password kee ilaali.
error.deviceLimit: Daangaan meeshaa Free plan irra gaheera. Meeshaa biraa irraa ba'i ykn meeshaalee dabalataa walqabsiisuuf gara Premium olka'i.

forgotPassword.title: Password dagattee?
forgotPassword.helper: Imeelii akaawuntii Chatforia uumuuf fayyadamte galchi; linkii nageenya qabu kan password reset gochu siif ergina.
forgotPassword.genericError: Gaaffii raawwachuun hin danda'amne. Yeroo muraasa booda irra deebi'i.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Yoo akaawuntiin imeelii sanaan jiraate, linkii password reset siif ergineerra. Daqiiqaa muraasa fudhachuu danda'a. Spam ykn promotions folder kee ilaali.

resetPassword.title: Password Reset Godhi
resetPassword.missingToken: Token password reset hin jiru ykn sirrii miti.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Token hin jiru ykn sirrii miti. Mee linkii password reset haaraa gaafadhu.
resetPassword.genericError: Dogoggora: Password reset gochuun hin danda'amne.
resetPassword.confirmPasswordPlaceholder: Password haaraa kee irra deebi'i galchi
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Password cimaa bakka biraatti hin fayyadamne filadhu.

about.title: Waa'ee Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia app ergaa ammayyaa kan nageenya, dhuunfaa fi walqunnamtii afaanota hedduu irratti xiyyeeffatu dha.
about.privacyDesc: Encryption cimaa fi too'annoo fayyadamaa irratti xiyyeeffanna.
about.accessDesc: Hiikkaa afaanota hedduu app keessatti ijaarame.
about.controlDesc: Ergaawwan badan, read receipts fi filannoowwan dhuunfaa siif kennina.

howItWorks.title: Chatforia Akkamitti Hojjeta
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia walqunnamtii salphaa, nageenya qabuu fi addunyaa guutuu keessatti hojjatuuf ijaarame.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Imeelii, username ykn filannoo sign-in deeggarame fayyadamuun galmaa'i.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Namoota waliin wal qunnami, garee uumi ykn lakkoofsa bilbilaa fayyadami.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ergaawwan, miidiyaa, sagalee fi viidiyoo saffisaan qoodi.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Hiikkaan keessatti ijaarame daangaa afaanii hir'isa.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Dhuunfaa, nageenya, ergaawwan badan fi qindaa'ina kee bulchi.

safety.title: Nageenya fi Qajeelfama Hawaasaa
safety.intro: Chatforia bakka nagaa fi kabajaa qabu uumuuf hojjechaa jira.
safety.respectDesc: Fayyadamtoonni walii isaanii kabajuu fi haala nageenya qabuun mari'achuu qabu.
safety.enforcementDesc: Yoo qajeelfamni cabame, akaawuntii irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuu dandeenya.

refund.title: Imaammata Deebii Maallaqaa
refund.intro: Chatforia keessatti tajaajila qulqullina qabu kennuuf ni carraaqna. Imaammatni kun yoom deebiin maallaqaa kennamuu akka danda'u ibsa.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions yeroo yerootti kaffalama. Yeroo kamiyyuu akaawuntii kee keessaa ykn platform bitannoo irraa haquu dandeessa.

eligibility.title: Ulaagaa deebii maallaqaa
eligibility.body: Deebiin maallaqaa kaffaltii lama ta'e, dogoggora billing, ykn rakkoo teknikaa guddaa irratti ilaalamuu danda'a.

nonRefundable.title: Kan hin deebifamne
nonRefundable.body: Yeroo baay'ee yeroo hin fayyadamne, subscription dursee hin haqamne, ykn kutaa billing period hin deebisnu.

thirdParty.title: Bitannoo qaama sadaffaa
thirdParty.body: Yoo Apple App Store ykn platform biraa irraa bitte, deebii maallaqaa platform sana irraa gaafachuu qabda.

intro.body: Imaammatni Dhuunfaa kun Chatforia odeeffannoo kee akkamitti walitti qabu, itti fayyadamu, eeguu fi qooduu akka danda'u ibsa. Chatforia odeeffannoo nuti arginu xiqqeessuuf ijaarame.

infoWeCollect.title: Odeeffannoo nuti walitti qabnu
infoWeCollect.account: Odeeffannoo akaawuntii, kan akka imeelii ykn lakkoofsa bilbilaa, galmee fi nageenyaaf.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Qabiyyee encrypted, kan akka ergaa fi bilbiloota, end-to-end encryptioniin eegama; nuti hin dubbisnu.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Odeeffannoo diagnostics fi usage, app fooyyessuuf fi dogoggora sirreessuuf.

sms.title: Lakkoofsa mobile fi SMS
sms.body: Lakkoofsa mobile kennuu yoo filatte, account verification, login alerts fi ergaawwan tajaajila waliin walqabatan erguuf itti fayyadamuu dandeenya. Yeroo kamiyyuu Settings keessatti ykn STOP erguun opt out gochuu dandeessa.

howWeUse.title: Odeeffannoo akkamitti fayyadamna
howWeUse.provide: Tajaajila kennuu, seensisa, nageenya fi abuse ittisuuf.
howWeUse.improve: Features, hiikkaa, reliability fi performance fooyyessuuf.

sharing.title: Qoodinsa
sharing.body: Odeeffannoo dhuunfaa kee hin gurgurru. Tajaajila keenya hojjechiisuuf processors amansiisoo waliin odeeffannoo murtaa'aa qooduu dandeenya.

rights.title: Mirgoota kee
rights.body: Naannoo kee irratti hundaa'uun, odeeffannoo kee argachuu, sirreessuu, haquu ykn processing irraa ba'uuf gaafachuu dandeessa.

retention.title: Kuusaa odeeffannoo fi nageenya
retention.body: Tajaajila itti fufsiisuuf barbaachisu qofa kuufna. Qabiyyee E2EE nuti decrypt hin goonu.

children.title: Ijoollee
children.body: Chatforia ijoollee umuriin 13 gadiif miti, yoo seerri naannoo kee umuriin biraa hin gaafanne.

changes.title: Jijjiiramoota
changes.body: Imaammata kana yeroo yerootti haaromsuu dandeenya, guyyaa haaromfame ni agarsiifna.

intro.body: Chatforia fayyadamuun Haala Tajaajilaa kana irratti walii galta. Yoo walii hin galle, tajaajila fayyadamuu hin qabdu.

accounts.title: Akaawuntii
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Odeeffannoo sirrii kennuu fi credentials kee eeguu qabda.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Sochii akaawuntii kee irratti itti gaafatamummaa qabda.

acceptableUse.title: Fayyadama eeyyamame
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Qabiyyee seeraan alaa, miidhaa qabu, spam ykn abuse hin eeyyamamu.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Cabbiin qajeelfamaa suspend ykn terminate gochuu danda'a.

sms.title: Walqunnamtii SMS
sms.body: Lakkoofsa mobile yoo kennite, ergaawwan account fi tajaajila waliin walqabatan SMS'n argachuuf walii galta. Message fi data rates jiraachuu danda'u.

yourContent.title: Qabiyyee kee
yourContent.body: Qabiyyee kee irratti mirga qabda. Tajaajila kennuuf hayyama barbaachisaa nuuf kennita.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer fi liability
disclaimer.body: Tajaajilli akka jiruitti kennama. Seerri eeyyamu hanga danda'utti Chatforia miidhaa al-kallattiif itti gaafatamaa miti.

changes.title: Jijjiiramoota
changes.body: Haala kana haaromsuu dandeenya. Jijjiirama booda fayyadamuu itti fufuun fudhachuu agarsiisa.

doNotSell.title: Odeeffannoo Dhuunfaa Koo Hin Gurgurin ykn Hin Qoodin
doNotSell.body: Chatforia odeeffannoo dhuunfaa kee hin gurguru. Jiraattota Californiaaf mirgoonni CPRA jalatti argamu.

cookies.title: Qindaa'ina Cookies
cookies.body: Chatforia cookies bu'uuraa kan session fi nageenyaaf barbaachisan fayyadama. Cookies browser kee keessatti bulchuu dandeessa.

contact.title: Nu qunnami
contact.successMsg: Galatoomi — gareen keenya imeeliin siif deebisa.
contact.errorSend: Erguun hin danda'amne. Mee support@chatforia.com irratti nuuf barreessi.

index.title: Blog Chatforia
index.intro: Yaadota walqunnamtii, nageenya, hiikkaa fi teknooloojii ergaa irratti dubbisi.
index.post1: Akkamitti Internet irratti nageenyaan mari'achuu dandeenya
index.post3: Maaliif app ergaa ammayyaa barbaachisaa ta'e

whyMessaging.title: Maaliif App Ergaa Amma Irra Caalaa Barbaachisaa Ta'e
whyMessaging.intro: App ergaa ammayyaa jireenya guyyaa guyyaa keessatti meeshaa walqunnamtii ijoo ta'eera.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Namoonni hiriyoota, maatii fi hojii waliin saffisaan wal qunnaman.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Ergaan battalumatti ga'a, suuraa fi viidiyoo dabalatee.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Appwwan akka Chatforia namoota biyya adda addaa keessa jiran walitti fidu.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Fayyadamtoonni ergaawwan isaanii irratti too'annoo fi iccitii barbaadu.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: AI, hiikkaa fi mobile connectivity waliin ergaan caalaatti cimaa ta'a.

global.title: Fuuldura Walqunnamtii Addunyaa
global.barriersDesc: Afaan, biyya fi network daangaa ta'uu hin qaban.
global.translationDesc: Hiikkaan battalaa namoota afaan adda addaa dubbatan walitti dhiheessa.
global.realtimeDesc: Namoonni ergaa, bilbila fi viidiyoo battalumatti barbaadu.
global.futureDesc: Walqunnamtiin fuulduraa smart, global fi user-controlled ta'a.
global.outro: Chatforia adeemsa kana keessaa tokko dha.

general.title: Gaaffiiwwan Waliigalaa
general.a1: Eeyyee, Free plan ni jira. Premium fi Plus immoo faayidaa dabalataa qabu.
general.a3: Chatforia ergaawwan afaanota hedduu keessatti ofumaan hiikuu danda'a.
general.a4: Eeyyee, Chatforia keessatti lakkoofsa haaraa argachuu ykn kan kee geessuu dandeessa.

network.title: Rakkoo network
network.body: Internet kee mirkaneessi, app haaromsi ykn irra deebi'ii seeni.

notifications.title: Beeksisawwan hin dhufne
notifications.body: Settings keessatti notifications fi permissions mirkaneessi.

messages.title: Ergaawwan hin ergamne
messages.body: Connection kee ilaali ykn app haaromsi.

account.title: Akaawuntii
account.deleteWarning: Akaawuntii kee haqachuun deebi'uu hin danda'u.

maintenance.title: Tajaajilli Yeroo Muraasaaf Hin Argamu
maintenance.body: Chatforia amma suphaa jira. Yeroo gabaabaa booda irra deebi'i.

offline.title: Offline jirta
offline.body: Internet kee deebi'ee yeroo hojjatu ergaawwan kee ni wal simatu.

language.title: Afaan
language.restartHint: Jijjiiramni muraasni app deebisanii banuu barbaadu danda'u.

finalLocalizationNotes.coverage: Afaan Oromo localization draft kun core UI, auth, messaging, calls, AI, billing, wireless, settings, support, legal, onboarding, marketing fi utility flows bal'inaan haguuga.
finalLocalizationNotes.productionCheck: Production dura JSON validation, key comparison against English source, duplicate-key cleanup, placeholder check, fi native speaker review taasifamuu qaba.
finalLocalizationNotes.styleRule: Terminology consistency: Olka'i = Upgrade, Haqi = Delete/Remove, Qindaa'ina = Settings, Marii = Chat/Conversation, Bilbila = Call, Ergaa = Message.
